name: Katol Road
metaTitle: Property in Katol Road Nagpur | NMRDA Approved Plots | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots in Katol Road Nagpur. Starting ₹22 Lakh. Up to 90% bank finance. Contact Mahalaxmi Infra today.
introduction: Katol Road is one of Nagpur's northern arterial routes connecting the city to the Katol region. The corridor has been gradually developing as a residential destination, offering buyers affordable plot options with improving infrastructure. As Nagpur's urban boundaries expand northward, Katol Road is expected to see increasing residential development activity. For buyers seeking budget-friendly plots with long-term appreciation potential in a less congested corridor, Katol Road presents a genuine opportunity. NMRDA-approved layouts on Katol Road offer legally clear investment options at competitive prices.
whyInvest: Less congested alternative to busy corridors
Future appreciation as city expands north
